case_title: FO 891 POST STREET PROPERTY LLC VS. DANIELLE CHARLESTON ET AL

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FO 891 POST STREET PROPERTY LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHARLESTON, DANIELLE DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 891 POST STREET, APT 210 SAN FRANCISCO CA 94109 SAN FRANCISCO, LEASE FORFEITED, ** JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMSIES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY ** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 70072628)
